purpose: Pre-launch baseline for the Day-30 gate (docs/SPRINT_30D_2026-07.md §Gate). Recorded BEFORE any launch action; the four pre-launch weeks are frozen history and cannot be gamed retroactively.
recordedBy: sprint Day-1/2 (ahead of the Day-7 schedule; data was already frozen)

npm.note: Gate #1 formula: final-week downloads W (Jul 29-Aug 04) minus noise floor N must be >= 150. N = 87.25 (mean). The 192 outlier week is retained verbatim; if the final decision is within +/-50 of the threshold, re-evaluate against the max-based floor too and say so in the decision doc. v1.31.0 was published to npm on 2026-07-06 (after this window closed).

github.note: Gate #2: >= 50 stars by Day 30 (from 6). Personal-network stars count only up to 10.

leads.note: Owner to run leads:list and fill countAtBaseline (expected 0). Gate #3: >= 1 genuine inbound lead.
